summary: Created docs/GATE-M6.md and recommend M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS for M6 Alpha system-complete exit. The gate satisfies Roadmap and acceptance-matrix evidence for start-to-victory playability, no accepted P0/P1 blockers, AI no-rescue completion, non-placeholder major-system UI, diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, layered AI, policy/event/encyclopedia surfaces, three-scenario pipeline, map candidate path, batch balance dashboard, accessibility, and adviser evidence. Limits are explicit: Alpha/local evidence only, no M7 content lock, no reviewer acceptance fabricated, manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and no product-code or frozen-architecture scope was changed.

decisions: Recommend M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS rather than PASS because evidence is Alpha-bounded/local and M7 content lock, external research breadth, signed release packaging, and future content/balance hardening remain outside this gate.
Do not mark M6 accepted from this handoff; independent qa_reviewer review and lead integration are still required.
Treat M4/M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context as historical process/product limits to preserve, not as hidden blockers for M6 Alpha exit.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly; this gate creates no manual node battle implementation task and no blocking M6/M7/M8 spike or research task.
No ADR is required because this gate records validation evidence only and changes no architecture, command/save/content schema, package boundary, product scope, dependency, or frozen decision.
No P0/P1 blocker was found. If QA identifies a real accepted P0/P1 issue, this gate must become BLOCKED or route REQUEST_CHANGES rather than downgrading the issue.
risks: PASS_WITH_LIMITS: three-scenario data is Alpha validation scaffolding and not M7 content lock.
PASS_WITH_LIMITS: adviser intervention evidence is local/privacy-safe and records no new external participant sessions.
PASS_WITH_LIMITS: batch artifact records tuning risks but no P0/P1 candidates.
Build health: Web and Storybook still emit chunk-size warnings; current evidence treats them as non-blocking P2 debt.
Test warning: MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning appears in root Vitest for deterministic worker fixtures; tests pass.
Desktop packaging is local smoke packaging, not signed release evidence.
No M7 content lock or M8 release work is authorized by this handoff.
requested_action: Independently review docs/GATE-M6.md, the systems_architect REVIEW handoff, the M6 evidence chain, required command results, limits, and scope guard. ACCEPT if the M6 Alpha gate evidence is sufficient; otherwise REQUEST_CHANGES or BLOCKED with concrete P0/P1 or scope findings.
